column1: # OWASP ZAP Rules Configuration — False Positive Suppressions
# Actions: IGNORE (suppress entirely), WARN (downgrade to warning), FAIL (force failure)
# These rules are suppressed because they are expected behavior for an
# API-only service that does not serve browser-rendered HTML.
# Rate-limiting: 429 responses are intentional (fastify-rate-limit protects all endpoints)
# CORS: Permissive CORS in dev/test is intentional; production restricts origins via CORS_ORIGINS env

column4: CORS is configured intentionally per environment

column1: # Anti-CSRF tokens: This is a REST API; it does not serve HTML forms.
# Authentication is via Authorization header (Bearer token), not cookies.

column4: API-only service — no browser form submissions

column1: # Content-Type header missing on error responses: Some error responses may
# omit Content-Type. This is informational, not a security issue.

column4: Some error paths omit Content-Type — informational only

column1: # X-Content-Type-Options missing: API responses are JSON, not rendered by browsers.
# X-Frame-Options missing: API does not serve frameable content.
# Cookie-related rules: The API uses stateless Bearer tokens, not session cookies.

column4: API uses Bearer tokens, not session cookies
